note: Provenance manifest for external-validation datasets. No large third-party data is committed. Entries with redistribution_allowed=false must be downloaded by the user from the source; fill sha256 after download and verify with itd_research.io.verify_checksum. Synthetic entries are for code verification and CI only and are NEVER external empirical validation.

datasets.title: Tiny synthetic PIV grid (CI fixture)
datasets.uncertainty_information: none (synthetic); two invalid vectors injected deterministically

datasets.title: JHU Turbulence Database - forced isotropic turbulence (1024^3)
datasets.licence: open for research use; see JHTDB terms
datasets.download_method: JHTDB cutout web service or getCutout / pyJHTDB (user-run)
datasets.format: hdf5 cutout -> resample to structured VTK/CSV
datasets.uncertainty_information: DNS (numerical); discretisation error documented by JHTDB

datasets.title: PIV Challenge reference cases (candidate)
datasets.licence: per PIV Challenge terms (check before redistribution)
datasets.download_method: download from pivchallenge.org (user-run); select a vortical case
